---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest detection for a game/launcher/emulator, a new option, or a UX change
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

### What
What should the plugin do that it currently doesn't?

### Why
What workflow does it unblock?

### If this is about adding a game / launcher / emulator
- Name:
- Bundle ID (`mdls -name kMDItemCFBundleIdentifier /Applications/<App>.app`):
- How is it usually launched (direct .app, CrossOver bottle, GameHub, etc.)?

### Alternatives considered
- Manual whitelist via the source properties? Why isn't that enough?
